publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-11-22 23:25:10 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Publications, printed materials, photographs, video recordings.
did.abstract: Programs, photographs, books, serials, papers, conference materials, and videos documenting the Club's activities and recent literature on transgender themes, including intersexuality. Books and serials from their library are cataloged individually.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: The Mid-Hudson Valley Transgender Association (MHVTA) is a support group for transgender people in the Hudson Valley region of New York State and New Jersey. Meetings have been held in Poughkeepsie, New York and other cities.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Programs, photographs, books, serials, papers, conference materials, and videos documenting the Club's activities and recent literature on transgender themes, including intersexuality. Books and serials from their library are cataloged individually.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series II. Event & Conference Related Materials Box 3

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 2, folder 27 and Box 3, folders 3 and 59 restricted until January 2041 (relocated to Accession File).

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Box 5: No reproductions or images, no sharing of people's contact information. Material may not be shared online or published until Jan 2041. Researchers are asked to sign a form agreeing to abide by these restrictions.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Mid-Hudson Valley Transgender Association, #7832. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Box 5 Folder 17: Researchers may not publish last name of author of letter until 2040.
